title: Expand and Collapse Approved Plan

findings.description: No plan expansion/collapse controls visible. This feature requires an active conversation with an approved plan. Cannot test due to known conversation crash bug.
findings.expected: Expand/collapse controls for viewing approved execution plans in the chat.
findings.actual: No plan-related UI elements visible in new chat view. Blocked from testing in active conversations.
findings.blocked_by: Known issue: clicking existing conversations crashes the app

verdict: Feature not implemented or blocked from testing. Requires active conversation.
